summary: Full backend + frontend E2E validation of NBS Front Desk Visitors Register. 25/25 backend pytest tests pass (auth JWT+cookie, visitors CRUD/checkout/export, admin users, geofence). Frontend Playwright verified: admin login, dashboard (stat cards + trend/purpose charts + Recent Visitors), Visitors register (create/search/checkout/edit/delete), badge print (name/print button/QR), CSV+PDF exports, admin Staff Accounts page, Settings page (geofence switch + save), and staff role gating (no Staff Accounts/Settings in sidebar; /users and /settings redirect to /dashboard).

issues: Recharts prints console warnings 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' — chart still renders correctly (ResponsiveContainer likely wraps a 0-height parent on first paint). Cosmetic only.

action_items: OPTIONAL: silence recharts ResponsiveContainer width/height=-1 console warnings on Dashboard by giving the chart parent an explicit min-height (e.g. wrap in a div className='h-64' or aspect ratio) — not a bug, cosmetic console noise only.
critical_code_review_comments: Password strength — /api/auth/register accepts any string as password (no min length / complexity). Consider a minimum length + complexity check on the backend to match the frontend `minLength=6`.
auth.py:218 assumes Emergent /session-data response contains 'session_token'; if the upstream response schema changes, KeyError bubbles as 500. Consider .get() with an explicit 401.
Admin cannot demote self is not enforced — /api/users PUT allows admin to change their own role to 'staff', which could lock the org out. Consider blocking self-role-change for the last admin.
Frontend Login.js line 34: `if (user && user !== null)` — the `user !== null` check is redundant since `user &&` already excludes null; minor cleanup.
CORS_ORIGINS env var exists in backend/.env but server.py only reads FRONTEND_URL — CORS_ORIGINS is unused/misleading; either remove the env key or actually parse and use it.
test_credentials: Admin admin@nbs.gov / Admin@NBS2026 (seeded). Staff staff@nbs.gov / Staff@NBS2026 auto-created by test fixture if missing. Fresh registrations created & cleaned up by tests.
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed visitor and test_staff_* users are created during pytest run and cleaned up in fixture teardown. Final geofence state left as: enabled=false, lat=9.05785, lng=7.49508, radius=200 — staff login unblocked as required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — 25 tests covering auth (JWT cookie, register, logout, /me), visitors (CRUD + checkout state transitions + stats + CSV/PDF export headers), admin users (list/create/update role/delete, self-delete blocked, staff forbidden), geofence (get/put admin-only, verify with far/near/admin-exempt, disable-on-teardown). Reuse via `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. UI checked: sidebar hides Staff Accounts/Settings for staff; ProtectedRoute redirects staff away from /users and /settings to /dashboard. Google login button verified present with correct data-testid 'google-login-btn'; full OAuth redirect not E2E tested (external redirect).
rca of the issue: N/A — no failing flows. Only cosmetic recharts warnings on Dashboard due to initial 0-sized ResponsiveContainer parent; not user-visible.
